instructions: Pay via the QR code, or copy the Pix code (copia e cola) and paste it into your bank app.

changeFlags.title: Change {{name}}'s flags?
changeFlags.regenDescription: Their unpaid charge will be canceled and regenerated at the new amount (new Pix code).
changeFlags.nextDescription: This changes how much they owe on the next charge.

markPaid.label: Mark paid
markPaid.title: Mark {{name}} as paid?
markPaid.description: Use this when the money arrived outside the Pix code — webhook missed, paid in cash. It is recorded as a manual override.

cancelCharge.label: Cancel
cancelCharge.title: Cancel {{name}}'s charge?
cancelCharge.description: They won't be able to pay this code anymore. You can regenerate later by editing their flags or reactivating.

markRefunded.label: Mark refunded
markRefunded.title: Mark {{name}} as refunded?
markRefunded.description: Only confirm after sending the money back manually from your bank app — the app never moves money. The amount leaves the collected total.

errors.notFinalized: Charging can only be activated on a finalized event
errors.minimumPositive: Base price minus both deductions must stay above zero
errors.onlyUnpaidPaid: Only an unpaid charge can be marked as paid
errors.onlyPaidRefunded: Only a paid charge can be marked as refunded
errors.onlyUnpaidCanceled: Only an unpaid charge can be canceled
errors.onlyExpiredRegenerated: Only an expired charge can be regenerated
errors.noCharge: You have no charge on this event
errors.flagsLocked: Charging is active — ask the admin to change your flags
